HERO.TITLE: A journey that takes you back to yourself, to the place where your greatest treasures lie.

FIVE_CONTINENTS.TITLE: 5 Continents Massage®
FIVE_CONTINENTS.DESCRIPTION: M5C is a deeply transformative touch therapy that combines ancient techniques. It supports the body's natural self-healing processes, promotes detoxification, and releases tension.

EXPANSE.TITLE: Expanse Therapy®
EXPANSE.DESCRIPTION: A treatment that helps calm the nervous system, reduce stress, and support the body's natural regeneration through the head–heart–gut connection.

VIBECODES.TITLE: Vibecodes® Therapy
VIBECODES.DESCRIPTION: A unique system that helps you become aware of, reprogram, and harmonize your inner patterns on a mental, emotional, and energetic level.

ABOUT.NAME: Edina Erzsébet Czinege
ABOUT.TITLE: 5 Continents Massage Practitioner, Expanse Therapist, Vibecodes Practitioner and Trainer
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION_1: I warmly welcome you into a space where you can pause for a moment and let go of everything that weighs on your body and soul. I believe that even during the most challenging periods of life, the possibility of inner strength and peace remains within us – even when we cannot feel it.
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION_2: Through my work, I support you with attention, acceptance, and mindful presence, helping you reconnect with yourself and move closer to a more balanced state of being.
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION_3: If you would like to learn more about my journey and how I arrived where I am today, click below to continue.

REVIEWS.TITLE: What My Guests Say
REVIEWS.REVIEW_1: It was the first massage of my life, and it was an amazing experience. I highly recommend this place, especially Edina! She is a great conversationalist and paid attention to me throughout the entire session.
REVIEWS.REVIEW_2: Edina's massage made my visit to Budapest absolutely perfect.
REVIEWS.REVIEW_3: I had a massage with Edina Czinege and it turned out to be the perfect choice! She is a very kind, professional, and intelligent massage therapist who knows exactly what her clients need. I had just started running again after a three-year break, so my whole body was aching, yet Edina could identify even better than I could which areas needed special attention. This proves that she is truly a master of her profession. I can only recommend her!
REVIEWS.REVIEW_4: I visited Edina and it was wonderful! She has amazing hands and gives fantastic massages. I highly recommend her to everyone!
REVIEWS.REVIEW_5: It was a truly pleasant wellness treatment, and the energy I felt after the massage was something special.
REVIEWS.REVIEW_6: I have visited many massage therapists, and I can confidently say that one of my best experiences was with Edina. I have already booked my next appointment.
REVIEWS.REVIEW_7: Thank you so much for the 5 Continents Massage. It was heavenly! I felt completely relaxed all day, as if I were floating above the ground. :D You are my favorite massage therapist.
REVIEWS.REVIEW_8: Edina provided a fantastic 5 Continents Massage and is highly skilled. I would definitely recommend her.
REVIEWS.REVIEW_9: Very kind, friendly, and a true professional. Edina has strong hands and knows exactly how to work with trigger points. Thank you so much <3 <3 <3
REVIEWS.REVIEW_10: I had a wonderful experience during the 5 Continents Massage. Edina is truly talented.

GOOGLE_MAPS.TITLE: Location & Directions
GOOGLE_MAPS.PARKING_DESCRIPTION: It is recommended to park near City Park (Városliget) and take Metro Line 1. The Opera station is approximately 1 minute away.
GOOGLE_MAPS.PUBLIC_TRANSPORT_1: A 5-minute walk from Arany János Street station on Metro Line 3.
GOOGLE_MAPS.PUBLIC_TRANSPORT_2: A 1-minute walk from Opera station on Metro Line 1.
GOOGLE_MAPS.PUBLIC_TRANSPORT_3: A 10-minute walk from Oktogon station on Tram Lines 4 and 6, or accessible via Metro Line 1.
GOOGLE_MAPS.PUBLIC_TRANSPORT_4: A 3-minute walk from Opera M stop on Trolleybus Lines 70 and 78.
GOOGLE_MAPS.PUBLIC_TRANSPORT_5: A 5-minute walk from Szent István Bazilika stop on Trolleybus Line 72.

PROFILE.NAME: Edina Erzsébet Czinege
PROFILE.TITLE: 5 Continents Massage Practitioner, Expanse Therapist, Vibecodes Practitioner and Trainer

CONTENT.PARAGRAPH_1: I graduated with honors as an Engineering Manager and spent many years working in the corporate world, where supporting growth and helping others advance in their professional journeys became an important part of my life. After eight years in the construction industry, however, a personal turning point led me in a new direction.
CONTENT.PARAGRAPH_2: Following the COVID period, I faced health challenges that inspired me to make significant lifestyle changes. This period marked the beginning of a deeper journey of self-discovery, during which I gradually developed a lifestyle where nutrition, movement, rest, and mental well-being work together in harmony.
CONTENT.PARAGRAPH_3: In 2024, I completed the 5 Continents Massage training together with my mother. The world of massage was not unfamiliar to me, as my mother, a medical massage therapist, introduced me to its foundations from an early age. I am deeply grateful that I can always turn to her for professional guidance and support.
CONTENT.PARAGRAPH_4: In the same year, I completed the Vibecodes Trainer Program in Bali, which brought a radically new perspective into my life. I came to understand that our inner patterns and attitudes fundamentally shape how we experience everyday life.
CONTENT.PARAGRAPH_5: Today, I work with people who carry many responsibilities, strive for perfection, and wish to create a more balanced and conscious way of living.
CONTENT.PARAGRAPH_6: My goal is to share tools and perspectives that help release tension and support the creation of lasting inner balance.

FIVE_CONTINENTS.TITLE: 5 Continents Massage
FIVE_CONTINENTS.PASS_NOTE: No more than 30 days may pass between individual sessions. The first session must take place within 30 days of purchasing the package.

VIBECODES.TITLE: Vibecodes
VIBECODES.ONLINE_INFO: For more information about online sessions

INFO.TITLE: Information About My Fixed-Rate Massages
INFO.OILS_TEXT_1: For Swedish massage treatments, I use natural (fragrance-free), skin-friendly massage creams and oils made from plant-based ingredients. Optionally, I also work with 5 Continents Massage oils.
INFO.OILS_TEXT_2: For facial massages, I use specially developed 5 Continents Massage oils designed specifically for this purpose.

CONTACT_BOX.TITLE: Didn't find the answer to your question?

QUESTION_1.QUESTION: Can I arrive without an appointment? If not, how far in advance should I book?
QUESTION_1.ANSWER: You are welcome to arrive without an appointment, but availability cannot be guaranteed. To secure your preferred time, it is recommended to book at least 2 hours in advance, though appointments can also be made 1–2 weeks ahead.

QUESTION_2.QUESTION: When do I need to pay? Can I pay by cash or card?
QUESTION_2.ANSWER: Payment is made after the treatment. Both cash and bank card payments are accepted.

QUESTION_3.QUESTION: When should I arrive for my appointment?
QUESTION_3.ANSWER: Please arrive 10–15 minutes early. Unfortunately, treatment times cannot be extended in the event of a late arrival.

QUESTION_4.QUESTION: What does the therapist wear during the treatment?
QUESTION_4.ANSWER: During treatments, I wear professional work attire (shirt and trousers). All services are provided strictly within professional boundaries.

QUESTION_5.QUESTION: Is the therapist qualified and continuously developing professionally?
QUESTION_5.ANSWER: Yes. I am qualified in Swedish massage and hold practitioner and trainer certifications in 5 Continents Massage, Expanse Therapy, and Vibecodes Therapy through the International Massage Federation of the 5 Continents. Continuous professional development is very important to me, and I regularly participate in advanced training programs.

QUESTION_6.QUESTION: Can I request additional, non-standard, or erotic services?
QUESTION_6.ANSWER: All treatments are provided strictly within professional boundaries. No erotic or sexual services are offered. During full-body treatments, clients remain in their underwear, and towels are used to ensure comfort and privacy. Any request or implication that falls outside professional boundaries will result in the treatment being terminated and the client being asked to leave.

HERO.TITLE: 5 Continents Massage®
HERO.DESCRIPTION: The healing touch of the world in one harmonious experience

INTRO.TITLE: 5 Continents Massage
INTRO.DESCRIPTION: A unique synergy of massage techniques from different traditions, biodynamic elements, and essential oil blends developed in Switzerland.

BENEFITS.TITLE: Benefits
BENEFITS.PHYSICAL_TEXT: The 5 Continents Massage offers numerous benefits for the body: it promotes deep relaxation and stress relief, stimulates blood and lymphatic circulation, oxygenates tissues, supports detoxification, strengthens the immune system, relieves pain such as back pain, muscle tension, digestive issues and migraines, and may support weight loss by improving metabolism.
BENEFITS.MENTAL_TEXT_1: It awakens the body's natural self-healing abilities by helping release emotional blockages and accumulated toxins.
BENEFITS.MENTAL_TEXT_2: It gradually restores self-confidence and vitality while helping to regain self-esteem, inner peace, and joy in life.

FACT.TITLE: Did You Know?
FACT.TEXT: According to research conducted by the HeartMath Institute, the magnetic field of the heart is approximately 5,000 times stronger than that of the brain.

TREATMENT.TITLE: How the Treatment Works
TREATMENT.SUBTITLE: Single Session of 5 Continents Massage
TREATMENT.TEXT_1: I use specially developed Swiss essential oil and plant oil blends created specifically for the 5 Continents Massage: the first phase focuses on detoxification, while the second phase supports relaxation and letting go.
TREATMENT.TEXT_2: The massage includes the face, head, and abdominal area as part of the full-body treatment.
TREATMENT.TEXT_3: It is recommended to arrive before washing your hair, as the oils will leave it oily.
TREATMENT.TEXT_4: Eating is not recommended within 2 hours before the treatment.
TREATMENT.TEXT_5: For optimal results, repeating the treatment every 3 weeks is recommended.

TECHNIQUES.TITLE: 5 Continents Massage Techniques
TECHNIQUES.DESCRIPTION: The power of the 5 Continents Massage lies in combining the following massage techniques with the rhythm and energy of the heart, greatly amplifying their effectiveness.

CHINA.TITLE: China
CHINA.DESCRIPTION: Bringing the body into greater balance

HAWAII.TITLE: Hawaii
HAWAII.DESCRIPTION: Wave-like movements that relax the entire body

SWEDEN.TITLE: Sweden
SWEDEN.DESCRIPTION: Focused on muscles and anatomical structures

TURKEY.TITLE: Turkey
TURKEY.DESCRIPTION: Energetic and dynamic techniques for hands and feet

HERO.TITLE: Expanse Therapy®
HERO.DESCRIPTION: Calming the nervous system and supporting inner balance.

INTRO.TITLE: Expanse Therapy
INTRO.DESCRIPTION: Helps release trauma and emotional imprints stored in the body, supports the body's natural cleansing processes, contributes to balanced physical functioning, and promotes the free flow of energy.

STAGES.TITLE: The Treatment Consists of Three Stages
STAGES.HEAD_TEXT: One of the most unique elements of the head massage is digipuncture, which promotes relaxation and release throughout the entire body through the skull.
STAGES.HEART_TEXT: In the heart phase, pericardium release plays a key role during heart coherence work, helping restore flexibility and reduce the effects of functional imbalances.
STAGES.ABDOMEN_TEXT: Most serotonin is produced in the digestive system. Abdominal massage supports the body's natural serotonin-related functions, which influence mood, sleep, and appetite.

FACT_1.TITLE: Did You Know?
FACT_1.TEXT: The primary purpose of light therapy is to support and alleviate issues caused by disruptions to the body's internal biological clock, such as seasonal depression. When light enters the eyes, it is converted into neural signals that influence neurotransmitter activity in the brain.

FACT_2.TITLE: Did You Know?
FACT_2.TEXT: During Expanse Therapy, neural and hormonal processes gently synchronize through the body. Signals transmitted through the skin connect with the brain's cognitive and emotional processing centers. The vagus nerve connects nearly all internal organs, linking the brainstem with the heart, lungs, and digestive system—the three core pillars of Expanse Therapy.

TREATMENTS.TITLE: Expanse Therapy Treatments
TREATMENTS.SINGLE_TEXT_1: I use Swiss-developed essential oil and plant oil blends specifically designed for Expanse Therapy.
TREATMENTS.SINGLE_TEXT_2: In the heart area, I work exclusively with the intercostal muscles through clothing or a towel.
TREATMENTS.SINGLE_TEXT_3: The treatment is performed fully clothed on a massage table, with only the abdomen exposed for abdominal massage. Comfortable clothing is recommended. Eating is not advised within two hours before the treatment.
TREATMENTS.COURSE_TEXT: Includes an initial consultation, four therapy sessions, and personalized follow-up support to help establish healthy lifestyle habits.

HERO.TITLE: Vibecodes Treatment®
HERO.DESCRIPTION: A method that helps rewrite the foundations of how you operate

INTRO.TITLE: What is Vibecodes?
INTRO.DESCRIPTION: A comprehensive system that helps you become aware of, reprogram, and harmonize your inner patterns on mental, emotional, and energetic levels.

CODE_1.TITLE: 1. Self-Hypnosis
CODE_1.DESCRIPTION: A conscious connection with the energy and vibration within you, influencing your body's functioning and overall state.

CODE_2.TITLE: 2. Limiting Beliefs
CODE_2.DESCRIPTION: Identifying and releasing patterns that hold you back from experiencing abundance.

CODE_3.TITLE: 3. Reprogramming Beliefs
CODE_3.DESCRIPTION: Letting go of what is not truly you and strengthening what genuinely belongs to you.

CODE_4.TITLE: 4. Harmonizing with Yourself
CODE_4.DESCRIPTION: Practical steps toward achieving a stable and elevated state of being.

CODE_5.TITLE: 5. The Path of Progress
CODE_5.DESCRIPTION: A structured framework that guides you through the process of growth.

CODE_6.TITLE: 6. Money & Abundance
CODE_6.DESCRIPTION: Developing a new mindset around money, opportunities, and prosperity.

CODE_7.TITLE: 7. Learning & Growth
CODE_7.DESCRIPTION: Following trends and integrating continuous personal development into everyday life.

CODE_8.TITLE: 8. The 3-6-9 Method
CODE_8.DESCRIPTION: A visualization and focus technique for achieving goals more effectively.

QUOTE.TEXT: Everything is energy. That's all there is to it. Match the frequency of the reality you want and you cannot help but get that reality. It can be no other way.
QUOTE.DESCRIPTION: This is not philosophy. This is physics.
QUOTE.AUTHOR: Albert Einstein

ONLINE.TITLE: Online Programs
ONLINE.CHALLENGE_DESCRIPTION: A structured process that guides you step by step through the entire system.
ONLINE.WORKSHOP_DESCRIPTION: You can learn each Vibecodes code individually. During each session, we focus on a single code and explore the topic in depth. The program consists of 8 online sessions (1 hour per week over 2 months).

TREATMENT.TITLE: In-Person Vibecodes Treatment
TREATMENT.SESSION_TEXT_1: During the first phase, we gently release blocks formed by negative thoughts and past emotional obstacles, creating space for inner freedom.
TREATMENT.SESSION_TEXT_2: In the second phase, the focus shifts to activating life force energy while a unique blend of 42 essential oils supports the harmonization process.
TREATMENT.COACHING_TEXT_1: I use one of the 8 Vibecodes, with a primary focus on hypnosis and meditation, as these tend to be the most effective approaches within a 25-minute session.
TREATMENT.COACHING_TEXT_2: The treatment is performed through clothing. Comfortable, loose-fitting attire is recommended.
